name: yuval-claude-marketplace
description: Yuval Personal marketplace of plugins, skills, and commands for working with Claude across Cowork and Claude Code.

plugins.name: yuval-core
plugins.description: v0.10.0 — Yuval Core workspace plugin: ideation scaffolding (init, refresh-persona), code-workspace extension (init-code, write-brief, promote-to-code, report-back), SPIRIT contract (D-028), Wiki 2.0 workshop layer (D-029) — three-layer wiki (generative: vision / goals / spirit-signals / backlog / ideation; retrospective: log + pages; state: index + next + memory-protocol) with proactive generative + retrospective triggers and session-start read sequence extended to load project character, Karpathy-style wiki discipline with live session pages, session continuity, persona management (v2 — mode-switcher + visual-first), framework-canonical memory protocol shared by ideation and code wikis.
